vehicles.slot: JaguarDrive rotary dial — override near rotary base or under console trim
shift: Locate override slot near rotary dial base under console trim.
Press brake. Rotate dial to N (or press N on newer electronic selector).
neutral: Restore power. Shift via dial or override.
vehicles.towMethod: RWD: lift from front (rear drive wheels roll). AWD: flatbed preferred.
towNotes: Rotary dial requires power — jump first if dead.

epb.override: Restore 12V. Hold EPB button to release. Manual: remove EPB module connector in trunk and connect spade connectors to motor pins to retract.
steps: Manual fallback: EPB module in trunk right side. Disconnect connector, insert spade connectors into correct slots (Violet/Brown and Yellow/Green pins noted on 2009-2015 XF). Connect to 12V to retract.

battery.warnings: AGM battery. AWD: flatbed preferred. EPB manual release requires wiring connector access.

knownIssues.title: EPB Manual Release Requires Wiring Access
knownIssues.detail: The manual release for the XF's electronic parking brake requires accessing the EPB motor connector in the trunk and connecting directly to the motor pins with spade connectors. Without power and without this method, the EPB cannot be released. A jump start is strongly preferred over the manual method.

vehicles.slot: Electronic selector override near selector base under console trim
shift: Press brake. Move to N. Confirm.
neutral: Restore power. Shift normally or use override.
vehicles.notes: Compact sports sedan. AWD: flatbed preferred.
vehicles.towMethod: RWD: lift from front. AWD: flatbed preferred.

vehicles.slot: JaguarDrive rotary dial — override under console trim near dial base
shift: Locate override under rotary dial base in console.
Press brake. Rotate dial or use button to select N.
neutral: Connect jump pack (12V only for PHEV).
Restore power. Shift via dial or override.
vehicles.notes: All F-Pace are AWD — FLATBED PREFERRED. PHEV: 12V only, flatbed only.
vehicles.warn: AWD: flatbed preferred. PHEV: 12V only, flatbed only.
vehicles.towMethod: FLATBED PREFERRED — AWD. PHEV: FLATBED ONLY.
towNotes: All F-Pace are AWD — flatbed preferred.
PHEV: HV orange cables, flatbed mandatory.

epb.override: Restore 12V. Hold EPB button. Manual: EPB module connector in trunk — same method as XF.
steps: Manual fallback: EPB module connector in trunk.

towingNotes: Note vehicle height for loading clearance.

battery.warnings: AWD: flatbed preferred. PHEV: 12V only, flatbed only.

vehicles.slot: Electronic selector — override near selector base under console trim
shift: Press brake. Move to N. Confirm.
vehicles.towMethod: FWD: rear lift. AWD: flatbed preferred.

vehicles.slot: Electronic touchscreen — Service menu for Tow Mode / Neutral. Override near selector base.
shift: PREFERRED: Use touchscreen Service menu to select Tow Mode / Neutral.
Override: locate slot near selector base. Insert key, press. Press brake. Move to N.
Without power: connect 12V jump pack to under-hood or accessible terminals first.
neutral: 12V battery accessible under hood or in dedicated access point.
Restore power. Use Service menu for Tow Mode.
FLATBED ONLY. NEVER touch HV battery (orange cables).
vehicles.notes: FLATBED ONLY. Electric drivetrain. Tow Mode via touchscreen.
vehicles.warn: FLATBED ONLY. 12V only — never touch HV orange cables/battery.
towNotes: Tow Mode via touchscreen is proper neutral method.
12V accessible under hood — check door jamb label for exact location.

epb.override: Restore 12V. Tow Mode on touchscreen releases EPB. Manual: EPB connector method (same as XF/F-Pace).
steps: Use Tow Mode on touchscreen — releases EPB and engages neutral.
Manual fallback: EPB module connector access.

battery.warnings: FLATBED ONLY. 12V auxiliary ONLY. Never touch orange HV cables.

knownIssues.title: FLATBED ONLY — Electric AWD
knownIssues.detail: The I-Pace has permanent AWD electric motors. Towing with any wheels on the ground will damage the drive units. Flatbed with Tow Mode active is the only safe method.

vehicles.slot: Rotary or electronic selector override at selector base under console trim
shift: Press brake. Move to N. Confirm.
neutral: Restore power. Shift normally or use override.
vehicles.notes: Sports car. Very low clearance. AWD: flatbed preferred.
vehicles.warn: Very low ground clearance. AWD: flatbed preferred.
vehicles.towMethod: RWD: lift from front (rear drive wheels roll). AWD: flatbed preferred. Very low — use wheel nets, not chains on body.
towNotes: Very low ground clearance — check approach angle carefully.
Sports car — use wheel baskets on flatbed, never hook body.

battery.location: Under hood (front storage) or trunk depending on trim
battery.jumpTerminals: Under hood — standard or trunk area
battery.warnings: AGM battery. Very low clearance. AWD: flatbed preferred.

knownIssues.title: Extremely Low Ground Clearance
knownIssues.detail: The F-Type, especially with sport or lowered suspension, has very low ground clearance. The approach angle on a flatbed must be minimal. Use ramp extensions if available. Never chain or hook the body panels.

vehicles.slot: JaguarDrive rotary dial — override under console trim near dial base
shift: Press brake. Rotate dial to N.
vehicles.notes: Flagship luxury sedan. Aluminum body — do NOT use standard chain/hook on body.
vehicles.warn: Aluminum body — do NOT hook or chain to body panels. AWD: flatbed preferred.
vehicles.towMethod: RWD: lift from front. AWD: flatbed preferred. Aluminum body — use soft tie-downs and wheel baskets.
towNotes: Aluminum body is soft — do not hook body panels.

epb.override: Restore 12V. Hold EPB button. Manual: EPB module connector same as XF.

battery.warnings: Aluminum body — no chains on body. AGM battery. AWD: flatbed.

knownIssues.title: Aluminum Body — Do Not Hook or Chain
knownIssues.detail: The XJ uses an all-aluminum body structure. Standard chains or hooks on the body panels will cause serious damage. Always use wheel baskets/straps or hook only at proper tow points. Never drape chains over the body.
